title: Physiotherapist
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

The Sports Care Centre is a premium, physiotherapist-led clinic in Singapore, focused on evidence-based rehabilitation, sports injury management, and long-term movement health. We are expanding our team and looking for passionate Physiotherapists / Senior Physiotherapists who want to grow their clinical skills in a supportive, high-performance environment.

Job Summary

We are looking for a Senior Physiotherapist who is clinically strong, patient-focused, and ready to take the next step in their career.

Responsibilities

  • Assess, diagnose, and manage a wide range of musculoskeletal and sports-related conditions to achieve effective treatment outcomes
  • Deliver high-quality, ethical, and patient-centred care that promotes recovery and enhances patient wellbeing
  • Collaborate closely with trainers to coordinate seamless rehabilitation and recovery plans tailored to individual patient needs
  • Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with patients to support ongoing care and foster trust
  • Mentor junior physiotherapists by providing clinical guidance and supporting their professional development
  • Drive clinic growth and enhance overall performance through active participation and leadership initiatives

Required competencies and certifications

  • Degree or Master in Physiotherapy recognised by AHPC Singapore
  • Full registration with AHPC or eligibility for registration
  • Strong interest in musculoskeletal and sports physiotherapy demonstrated through clinical practice
  • Effective communication and patient-care skills applied in clinical settings
  • Motivated, ethical, and growth-oriented mindset
  • Minimum 2 years of clinical experience


Why Join us?

  • Competitive salary + performance incentive
  • Structured mentorship and career progression
  • Exposure to sports rehab, premium clientele & complex cases
  • Support for courses and professional development
  • Modern facilities and collaborative team culture
  • Opportunity to grow into senior / leadership roles

postedCompany.description:
The Sports Care Centre was started in 2010 with a team of Physiotherapists and Sports Therapists that specialises in musculoskeletal injuries treating athletic and non athletic injuries.

We are committed to providing care to injuries sustained at all levels.
postedCompany.name: THE SPORTS CARE CENTRE PTE. LTD.
